blended.narrative: Le Massif is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,134 ft. Looking ahead, 45 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 31" of heavy snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
